ground.what_this_is: This is a technical dashboard for the 'Twin' system, specifically showing the 'Model of Tim' content node which acts as a volatile, real-time reference for grading.
ground.what_you_can_do: You can view the node's current status (marked as 'RAN'), read its volatile content digest, and see the provenance grading and echo-guard rules applied to the system's turns.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the toolbar region (Toolbar.tsx); modes are defined as nodes (rhm_mode) and managed by the MODES registry; add a mode by registering one there.
howto.what: The presence dial on the toolbar, the selector for the RHM's current mode.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click it to pick a presence mode (focus, listening, walkthrough, etc.), which changes the verbs the RHM offers and how it speaks; clicking it again disables the mode.

howto.how_to_change: The node is driven by the canvas region (NodeShape.tsx); content updates are managed via the system's volatile state wire.
howto.what: A volatile content node on the canvas displaying Tim's synthesised principles and laws.
howto.what_you_can_do: View the explicit principles and implicit model, check the volatile status (fail-loud), and inspect the path to the foundation document.

howto.how_to_change: It is surfaced by the echo-guard logic in the training signal pipeline; changing the verdict requires modifying the guard rules or the source turn.
howto.what: A verdict marker on the twin's training signal, indicating a turn was rejected due to echo-guard rules.
howto.what_you_can_do: View the status of a specific operator turn that was filtered out by the echo-guard system.

howto.how_to_change: Mockup-only; no built code path maps to this specific text yet.
howto.what: The 'no confidence' notice on the twin dashboard.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the principle that no confidence score is shown by law; observe the deliberate absence of a meter.

howto.how_to_change: It is a read-only display of the training signal's current state; changes occur only when corpus ingestion (D8) is completed and the learned model is updated.
howto.what: The explicit status of the Twin's learning phase, indicating it is currently abstaining from prediction.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the system's current posture: that the mechanism is live but the twin is not yet built to predict Tim's decisions.

howto.how_to_change: It is the 'inbox' link within the .tabbar region (App.tsx); changing its label or behavior is a code change in the tabbar shell.
howto.what: The Inbox tab entry in the mobile navigation bar.
howto.what_you_can_do: Select this to switch the main view to the Inbox surface where decisions and approvals are managed.

howto.how_to_change: The surface is RhmChat.tsx; the state logic is driven by the RHM-modes and RHM-copresence wires in suite.py:chat.
howto.what: The presence dial on the chat header, indicating the system's current state of engagement.
howto.what_you_can_do: View the system's current mode (background vs. presence) and toggle the presence state via the dropdown.

reasons: accuracy jury (Layer 2, SOFT — variance not error): no quorum that the dossier is grounded in the element (0 of 3 draws agreed grounded). Flagged for operator scrutiny.

howto.what_you_can_do: View the live verification state of the chat system (marked as 'exists · verified') to confirm the system is active and ready for interaction.
